verses.text: The inner east gate is shut six days but opened on the sabbath and new moon, when the people worship at the door. Set times. God appoints days for His people to draw near.
The inner east gate is shut six days but opened on the sabbath and new moon, when the people worship at the door. Set times. God appoints days for His people to draw near.
The inner east gate is shut six days but opened on the sabbath and new moon, when the people worship at the door. Set times. God appoints days for His people to draw near.
The prince's offerings on the sabbath and new moon are appointed — lambs, a ram, and meat offerings. Ordered worship. The leader sets the pattern of devotion.
The prince's offerings on the sabbath and new moon are appointed — lambs, a ram, and meat offerings. Ordered worship. The leader sets the pattern of devotion.
The prince's offerings on the sabbath and new moon are appointed — lambs, a ram, and meat offerings. Ordered worship. The leader sets the pattern of devotion.
The prince's offerings on the sabbath and new moon are appointed — lambs, a ram, and meat offerings. Ordered worship. The leader sets the pattern of devotion.
The prince enters by the porch; the people coming in by the north go out by the south, 'not turn back.' Orderly worship. Coming to God, we press forward, not back.
The prince enters by the porch; the people coming in by the north go out by the south, 'not turn back.' Orderly worship. Coming to God, we press forward, not back.
The prince enters by the porch; the people coming in by the north go out by the south, 'not turn back.' Orderly worship. Coming to God, we press forward, not back.
In the feasts the offerings are appointed, and for a freewill offering the gate is opened for the prince. Willing gifts. God welcomes the offering freely brought.
In the feasts the offerings are appointed, and for a freewill offering the gate is opened for the prince. Willing gifts. God welcomes the offering freely brought.
A lamb is to be prepared 'every morning' for a continual burnt offering with its meat offering. Daily devotion. God is to be worshipped steadily, morning by morning.
A lamb is to be prepared 'every morning' for a continual burnt offering with its meat offering. Daily devotion. God is to be worshipped steadily, morning by morning.
A lamb is to be prepared 'every morning' for a continual burnt offering with its meat offering. Daily devotion. God is to be worshipped steadily, morning by morning.
A gift to the prince's sons is theirs, but to a servant returns at jubilee; he shall not seize the people's inheritance. Just stewardship. The ruler must not enrich himself at his people's cost.
A gift to the prince's sons is theirs, but to a servant returns at jubilee; he shall not seize the people's inheritance. Just stewardship. The ruler must not enrich himself at his people's cost.
A gift to the prince's sons is theirs, but to a servant returns at jubilee; he shall not seize the people's inheritance. Just stewardship. The ruler must not enrich himself at his people's cost.
He is shown the chambers where the priests boil the trespass and sin offering and bake the meat offering. Set apart. The holy offerings are prepared in their own place.
He is shown the chambers where the priests boil the trespass and sin offering and bake the meat offering. Set apart. The holy offerings are prepared in their own place.
In the court's four corners are courts with boiling places where the ministers cook the people's sacrifices. Provision for all. God's house has room to serve every worshipper.
In the court's four corners are courts with boiling places where the ministers cook the people's sacrifices. Provision for all. God's house has room to serve every worshipper.
